results.rendered_html:
1. lāva (von lū) adj. (f. ī) schneidend, abschneidend, pflückend: kuśasūci˚  RAGH. 13,43 . kusumalāvī f. Blumenleserin  Spr. 1575 . śatru˚ Feinde zerhauend, — tödtend  BHAṬṬ. 6,87 .
— Vgl. kāṇḍa˚, puṣpa˚.

results.rendered_html:
lāva a. (vī f.) [lū kartari ghañ]
1 Cutting, lopping, cutting off; kuśasūcilāvaṃ  R. 13. 43. 
2 Plucking, gathering.
3 Cutting down, killing, destroying;  Bk. 6. 87. 
— vaḥ
1 Cutting.
2 A quail.
